interventions.name: B3 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: individual-versus-population explanation sorts to remove need-based reasoning

interventions.name: B3 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: mechanism comparison routines separating selection, drift, migration, and mutation roles

interventions.name: B3 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: biodiversity case analyses that require process explanations rather than description only

interventions.name: B3 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: population-evidence checks that tie claims to observable frequency or comparative patterns
